name_cn:
Puzzle Edge 2.0 New Color ❤️
👈 Newly upgraded and online ♻️
Size: 18-8-12.5cm
Geometric design upgraded! Adds external stitching to the classic silhouette. Large body made of imported Nappa calfskin with YKK hardware.
Feels hin good~ versatile and practical, too beautiful to look away ✨. Very photogenic. Ladies, go for it 🐤
